001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.ReportImage;
004import java.io.IOException;
005import java.util.UUID;
006import org.springframework.core.io.Resource;
007import org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeException;
008import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
009
010/**
011 * Service interface for report image business logic operations.
012 */
013public interface ReportImageService {
014
015  /**
016   * Retrieves a specific image from an issue report.
017   *
018   * @param externalId The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
019   * @param imageId The external ID (UUID) of the image.
020   * @return The requested report image.
021   */
022  ReportImage getImage(UUID externalId, UUID imageId);
023
024  /**
025   * Uploads an image file and creates a corresponding {@link ReportImage} metadata entry.
026   * <p>
027   * The uploaded file is validated, stored using the configured {@code StorageService}, and the
028   * generated storage key is saved as the image locator. Only the report owner may upload images.
029   * </p>
030   *
031   * @param externalKey The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
032   * @param file        The uploaded image file.
033   * @return The newly created {@link ReportImage} metadata.
034   * @throws IOException            If an I/O error occurs while storing the file.
035   * @throws HttpMediaTypeException If the uploaded file's MIME type is not allowed.
036   */
037  ReportImage uploadImage(UUID externalKey, MultipartFile file)
038      throws IOException, HttpMediaTypeException;
039
040  /**
041   * Retrieves the raw image file associated with a stored image.
042   * <p>
043   * This method is used by the controller to serve the actual binary image data to the client.
044   * The returned {@link Resource} may represent a file on disk or another storage backend.
045   * </p>
046   *
047   * @param key The storage key (typically the generated filename) used to locate the file.
048   * @return A {@link Resource} representing the stored image file.
049   * @throws IOException If the file cannot be retrieved from storage.
050   */
051  Resource getImageFile(String key) throws IOException;
052
053  /**
054   * Deletes an image belonging to an issue report.
055   * <p>
056   * This operation removes both the metadata entry and the underlying stored file. Only the report
057   * owner or a manager may delete images.
058   * </p>
059   *
060   * @param externalKey The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
061   * @param imageId     The external ID (UUID) of the image to delete.
062   * @throws IOException If an error occurs while deleting the stored file.
063   */
064  void deleteImage(UUID externalKey, UUID imageId) throws IOException;
065
066}
